title: echinus nelii
intro: Echinus nelii, also known as the Globe Thistle or Echinops ritro, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Echinus nelii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Echinus nelii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
